---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.hero-banner}
# *Himanshu Goel*
::: {.tagline} 
📍 Ellicott City, MD · [hgchemical@gmail.com](mailto:hgchemical@gmail.com) · [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=YOUR_SCHOLAR_ID&hl=en&sortby=pubdate)
:::

::: {.badge-row}
[☠️ Computational Toxicology]{.hero-badge}
[🧫 New Approach Methodologies]{.hero-badge}
[🧬 Computational Drug Discovery]{.hero-badge}
[🧪 Toxicogenomics]{.hero-badge}
[🤖 Agentic AI / LLM]{.hero-badge}
[🤖 Machine Learning]{.hero-badge}
[📊 Cheminformatics]{.hero-badge}
[🔬 Bioinformatics]{.hero-badge}
[📊 Multi-OMICS]{.hero-badge}
[⚙️ Monte Carlo & Molecular Dynamics]{.hero-badge}
:::
:::


---

## About me

Computational Scientist with 12+ years of experience at the intersection of **predictive toxicology**, **drug design**, and **AI/ML for life sciences**. I build end-to-end computational pipelines that turn complex biological and chemical data into actionable safety and efficacy insights.

In my most recent role at [BHSAI / Henry M. Jackson Foundation](https://bhsai.org/) (DoD, DTRA, NIH, AFRL funded), I led computational toxicology research across several core areas:

- **Data curation & visualization:** Extracted actionable insights from large-scale chemical and biological datasets using PCA, t-SNE, UMAP, clustering, and heatmaps.
- **ML for compound classification:** Trained DNN, GNN, and transformer LLM classifiers to predict compound activity at neurotoxicity-relevant GPCR targets.
- **Generative AI:** Designed novel molecular structures and supported drug repurposing.
- **Neurotoxicity:** Assessed 200+ chemicals using high-throughput Multi-Electrode Array (MEA) data, integrating dose-response modeling (tcplfit2) and chemical–protein interaction networks to build mechanistic toxicity profiles.
- **Toxicogenomics:** Developed RNA-Seq pipelines across rat, guinea pig, and human hepatocyte systems — identifying biomarkers for liver and kidney injury and performing cross-species IVIVE analysis. Published in *Int. J. Mol. Sci.* (2023, 2024).
- **Integrative safety science:** Connected genomics, bioinformatics, and toxicology to improve understanding of chemical impact on human health and strengthen safety assessments.
- **ADMET profiling:** Conducted risk assessment of chemical compounds using vNN-ADMET and SwissADME.

Before that, I was a postdoctoral researcher at [Dr. MacKerell's CADD Center](https://mackerell.umaryland.edu/), University of Maryland, where I developed the [SILCS](https://silcsbio.com/) drug discovery framework — including a novel water network modeling method (SILCS-MC Water) — and built predictive models for hERG cardiotoxicity and protein–ligand binding affinity.

I thrive in cross-functional environments, collaborating closely with biologists, toxicologists, and software engineers to translate in silico findings into real-world impact. I have a strong commitment to **New Approach Methodologies (NAM)** — integrating in vitro assays, multi-OMICS, and computational models to reduce animal testing and improve translational safety prediction.

**I'm currently open to new opportunities** in computational toxicology, drug screening & discovery, or AI/ML for life sciences. [Get in touch →](mailto:hgchemical@gmail.com)

→ [See my full education & research journey](education.qmd)  
→ [Publications on Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=YOUR_SCHOLAR_ID&hl=en&sortby=pubdate)

---

## Expertise

::: {.expertise-grid}
[Predictive Toxicology]{.expertise-pill}
[New Approach Methodologies (NAM)]{.expertise-pill}
[Toxicogenomics / RNA-Seq]{.expertise-pill}
[Multi-Electrode Array (MEA)]{.expertise-pill}
[In Vivo & In Vitro Assays]{.expertise-pill}
[ADMET Profiling]{.expertise-pill}
[Multi-OMICS]{.expertise-pill}
[Computer-Aided Drug Design]{.expertise-pill}
[Method Development & Application]{.expertise-pill}
[Virtual Screening (Ligand & Structure-Based)]{.expertise-pill}
[Pharmacophore-Based Screening]{.expertise-pill}
[Molecular Docking]{.expertise-pill}
[Free Energy Perturbation (FEP)]{.expertise-pill}
[Hit Identification & Hit Expansion]{.expertise-pill}
[Hit-to-Lead Selection]{.expertise-pill}
[Lead Optimization]{.expertise-pill}
[Cheminformatics / RDKit]{.expertise-pill}
[Substructure & Similarity Search]{.expertise-pill}
[Fingerprint · Graph · Embedding-Based Search]{.expertise-pill}
[Pharmacophore Searching]{.expertise-pill}
[Fragment-Based Design]{.expertise-pill}
[QSAR & Ligand-Based Modeling]{.expertise-pill}
[Active Learning & Iterative Design]{.expertise-pill}
[Physics-Based Simulations (MD · FEP)]{.expertise-pill}
[Machine Learning / Deep Learning]{.expertise-pill}
[Graph Neural Networks]{.expertise-pill}
[LLM / Transformer models]{.expertise-pill}
[Agentic AI / LangGraph / RAG]{.expertise-pill}
[Generative Chemistry (SMILES · Graph · Diffusion)]{.expertise-pill}
[ML Model Integration into Workflows]{.expertise-pill}
[Molecular Dynamics]{.expertise-pill}
[Monte Carlo Simulations]{.expertise-pill}
[DFT / Quantum Chemistry]{.expertise-pill}
[Python · R · Fortran · C++]{.expertise-pill}
[Cross-Functional Collaboration]{.expertise-pill}
[Biologist · Chemist · Toxicologist · Engineer Teams]{.expertise-pill}
[Scientific Communication & Reporting]{.expertise-pill}
:::

---

## Technical skills

```{=html}
<style>
.skills-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr));
  gap: 1.2rem;
  margin: 1.2rem 0 2rem;
}
.skill-card {
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 1.1rem 1.3rem;
  background: white;
}
.skill-card-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.skill-card-icon { font-size: 1.3rem; }
.skill-card-title {
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  color: #1a5276;
}
.skill-pills {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 6px;
}
.skill-pill {
  display: inline-block;
  background: #f0f4f8;
  color: #2c3e50;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  padding: 3px 10px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  border: 1px solid #dde3ea;
}
</style>

<div class="skills-grid">

  <div class="skill-card">
    <div class="skill-card-header">
      <span class="skill-card-icon">💻</span>
      <span class="skill-card-title">Programming Languages</span>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-pills">
      <span class="skill-pill">Python</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">R</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">Fortran</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">C</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">C++</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">Bash</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">SQL</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">OpenMP</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">OpenACC</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="skill-card">
    <div class="skill-card-header">
      <span class="skill-card-icon">⚗️</span>
      <span class="skill-card-title">Simulation Software</span>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-pills">
      <span class="skill-pill">CHARMM</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">OpenMM</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">Schrödinger Suite</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">GROMACS</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">NAMD</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">SILCS</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">AutoDock Vina</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">Gaussian</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">CP2K</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">CPMD</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">MOE</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">Discovery Studio</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">KNIME</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">Molpro</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">Matlab</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">VMD</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">PyMol</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="skill-card">
    <div class="skill-card-header">
      <span class="skill-card-icon">🤖</span>
      <span class="skill-card-title">ML / AI & Visualization</span>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-pills">
      <span class="skill-pill">Random Forest</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">XGBoost</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">Naïve Bayes</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">Regression</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">Deep Neural Networks</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">Graph Neural Networks</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">Transformer LLMs</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">PyTorch</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">TensorFlow</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">DeepChem</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">LangChain</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">LangGraph</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">RAG</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">Agentic AI</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">Custom LLM Workflows</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">Matplotlib</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">RDKit</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="skill-card">
    <div class="skill-card-header">
      <span class="skill-card-icon">☠️</span>
      <span class="skill-card-title">Computational Toxicology</span>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-pills">
      <span class="skill-pill">vNN-ADMET</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">SwissADME</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">tcplfit2</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">Kallisto</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">RNA-Seq</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">DESeq2</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">MEA Data Analysis</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">Dose-Response Modeling</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">IVIVE</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">Pathway Enrichment</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">Neurotoxicity Profiling</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">Multi Electrode Array (MEA)</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="skill-card">
    <div class="skill-card-header">
      <span class="skill-card-icon">🛠️</span>
      <span class="skill-card-title">Tools & Platforms</span>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-pills">
      <span class="skill-pill">GitHub</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">HPC Clusters</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">Docker</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">Cloud Computing</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">AWS</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">GCP</span>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```
